properties.titulo_evento: Iran war live: US launches new strikes; Trump mourns killed soldiers
properties.descricao: US president says death of soldiers in Jordan a 'sad thing' as US forces attack Iran for the eighth consecutive night.

properties.titulo_evento: Drone video shows scale of major wildfire in northern Spain

properties.titulo_evento: Why has the ‘ceasefire’ in Gaza failed to stop Israel’s attacks?
properties.descricao: Palestinians who have endured Israel's genocidal war are still being targeted.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran supreme leader warns of ‘unforgettable lessons’ if US attacks continue
properties.descricao: Mojtaba Khamenei says Trump's signature is 'worthless' and that 'bullying' is a core element of US foreign policy.

properties.titulo_evento: Israeli attacks on residential areas in Gaza kill eight
properties.descricao: Attacks hit neighbourhoods in Gaza City far beyond the line Israeli forces are meant to hold under the ceasefire.

properties.titulo_evento: Damage visible at Iran bridges and water plant after US attacks
properties.descricao: US strikes damaged bridges and a water desalination plant in Iran after a seventh straight night of attacks.

properties.titulo_evento: US military says two service members killed in Iranian strike in Jordan
properties.descricao: US and Iran have stepped up attacks in the last week, prompting alarm about return to full-scale war across the region.

properties.titulo_evento: Lebanon’s Aoun to meet Trump in Washington to discuss Israel talks
properties.descricao: The Lebanese and US presidents are expected to discuss the ceasefire, southern Lebanon, and Israel’s withdrawal.

properties.titulo_evento: UK’s Josh Kerr smashes longstanding world mile record in London
properties.descricao: Kerr ran a 3:42.66 mile at the London Diamond League, smashing Hicham El Guerrouj’s world record by 0.47 seconds.

properties.titulo_evento: What to expect after the US reimposes naval blockade on Iran’s ports?
properties.descricao: Pressure is expected to build on the Iranian public, as well as global energy markets due to the US blockade.

properties.titulo_evento: Two US troops killed and one missing after Iranian attack in Jordan
properties.descricao: Iran and the US have traded strikes as hostilities re-escalated this week, with Tehran targeting US military facilities across the Gulf region.

properties.titulo_evento: Russians turn to cash, putting more strain on slowing wartime economy
properties.descricao: Russians have been hit by mobile internet shutdowns and more businesses are seeking to dodge tax after more than four years of war with Ukraine.

properties.titulo_evento: Russian online retail warehouses hit by deadly Ukrainian strikes
properties.descricao: Drones targeted Wildberries facilities near Moscow and in Tambov. Ukraine's leader called them "major logistics facilities" supplying "sanctioned components".

properties.titulo_evento: Many Ukrainian soldiers outraged over removal of defence minister, troops tell BBC
properties.descricao: Protests erupted in Ukraine on Thursday after Mykhailo Fedorov's removal - and now soldiers are also criticising the move.

properties.titulo_evento: White House defends Argentina team over Falklands banner
properties.descricao: The comments could further fuel the row over the incident, which has seen Downing Street back calls for Fifa to investigate.

properties.titulo_evento: One anti-war critic fined, another held as Russia clamps down on dissent
properties.descricao: While Boris Nadezhdin is barred from running for parliament, blogger Ilya Remeslo is remanded in custody.

properties.titulo_evento: Magnitude 7.3 earthquake quake strikes off Mexico coast
properties.descricao: The US Tsunami Warning Center has recorded waves 0.3m (1.1 feet) high in Puerto Madero and Chiapas in Mexico after the quake.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump alleges China meddled in 2020 election and questions voting security ahead of midterms
properties.descricao: China said Trump's claims were fabricated and US Democrats said he was paving the way to undermine November's elections.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump queries Tuchel's tactics in England's semifinal heartbreak against Argentina
properties.descricao: "They took their best player, and they put him on defence," Trump said, referring to England striker Harry Kane.

properties.titulo_evento: US forces strike Iran for seventh consecutive night
properties.descricao: Iran's Fars state news agency reported that Iranian forces had responded by attacking US allies and bases in the region, including the Ali Al Salem airbase in Kuwait.

properties.titulo_evento: EU foreign policy chief Kallas visits EU naval mission in the Red Sea

properties.titulo_evento: 7.3 magnitude earthquake strikes Mexico and Guatemala coasts, tsunami alert lifted
properties.descricao: A 7.3 magnitude earthquake shook the coasts of Mexico and Guatemala on Friday, its epicentre off Chiapas at about 15 km deep.

properties.titulo_evento: China rejects Trump's election interference accusations as 'groundless'
properties.descricao: At a daily briefing in Beijing, a spokesperson called on the US to stop making what it described as 'groundless accusations' against China.

properties.titulo_evento: China rescuers race to find trapped people after landslide
properties.descricao: China launched a large-scale rescue operation after a landslide struck Pengshui County in Chongqing municipality on 17 July, burying part of a residential area and trapping an unknown number of people.

properties.titulo_evento: Euronews aboard EU warships in the Red Sea: Europe eyes wider mandate as Houthi threat grows
properties.descricao: In a special report from EU patrol ships in Djibouti, Kaja Kallas told Euronews that the 27-member bloc was discussing expanding Aspides' mandate and that ships pledged to a Hormuz coalition could be redeployed to the Red Sea in the interim.

properties.titulo_evento: Kim Jong Un hosts top Chinese official in Pyongyang
properties.descricao: China has sought to reassert its position in the Korean peninsula in recent years. Chinese President Xi Jinping made his own visit to Pyongyang in June as part of this push.

properties.titulo_evento: Chile assesses damage after deadly storm surge floods coastal city of Penco
properties.descricao: Chile's central coast has been hit by an exceptional storm surge that flooded homes and damaged infrastructure. Authorities are urging residents to stay away from the shoreline as dangerous sea conditions continue.

properties.titulo_evento: Qatar’s air defence intercepts fresh Iranian missile barrage over Doha
properties.descricao: Iran has unleashed a new wave of attacks across the Gulf, targeting Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain and Jordan, following Tehran’s continuous threats of dragging the Gulf countries back into its escalating confrontation with the US over the Strait of Hormuz.

properties.titulo_evento: Pogacar wins Tour de France 14th stage to extend overall lead
properties.descricao: Slovenia's cycling phenomenon Tadej Pogacar launched a devastating late attack Saturday to win the mountainous 14th stage of the Tour de France, extending his lead over Jonas Vingegaard.

properties.titulo_evento: Josh Kerr smashes men’s mile world record that stood unbroken since 1999
properties.descricao: Britain's Josh Kerr clocked 3min 42.66sec in the men's mile at a high-octane Diamond League on Saturday, smashing the record set by Morocco's Hicham El Guerrouj in Rome in 1999.

properties.titulo_evento: Andrew Tate, brother arrested in Miami, UK seeks extradition
properties.descricao: Andrew and Tristan Tate were taken into custody by the US Marshals Service in Miami on a sealed warrant. The UK has requested their extradition on charges that include trafficking and rape.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran: US attacks show Trump's word is 'utterly worthless'
properties.descricao: Iran has issued a written statement attributed to new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei. It rebukes the recent US strikes and warns of "unforgettable lessons." DW has the latest.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine drones target Russian warehouses and oil sites
properties.descricao: Ukrainian drones have struck warehouses, an oil depot and other targets across Russia, killing nine people and injuring over 80 more. Kyiv said its strikes targeted suppliers for Moscow's ongoing invasion of Ukraine.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: Minister warns of high terror threat
properties.descricao: Germany's interior minister has warned of a heightened security threat, saying an attack could be imminent. Meanwhile, a train security guard was critically injured after falling from a moving train. DW has the latest.

properties.titulo_evento: Amid elections, Sao Tome and Principe balances global powers
properties.descricao: As voters head to the polls, Sao Tome and Principe is attracting international scrutiny. A military agreement with Russia has heightened interest in the strategically located archipelago.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump threatens Canada over wildfire smoke choking US cities
properties.descricao: Soot from Canadian wildfires blanketed a dozen U.S. states Friday, as government agencies warned millions of Americans to stay indoors.

properties.descricao: The Trump administration has recently sought to scale back sanctions as adversaries develop workarounds that some believe could erode the U.S. dollar’s supremacy.

properties.descricao: Shipping traffic was at its lowest level in more than a month and oil prices moved higher as the Iran war continued to disrupt the supply of energy.
